other_observers: Gene Rutherford; I found the bird.
description: Medium sized warbler with yellow-olive upperparts. Head with gray hood. Lores black. No eye-ring present at all. Dark eye. Upper mandible light gray with lower mandible slightly lighter in color. Chin and throat gray. Black feathering along lower border of throat and upper chest forming a "black bib." Rest of underparts and flanks yellow. Undertail coverts yellow.Behaviors: The bird flew up from some dense leaf litter on the ground to a low, exposed branch in the open. It then flew away out of sight across a field towards a running stream.Call: not heardPlumage: adult
